ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "iu_archives_number" INTEGER /* IU Archives Number of the image */,
  "purl" TEXT /* Persistent URL (PURL) for the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the full image */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date the image was archived */,
  "notebook_description" TEXT /* Description of the image from the notebook */,
  "slide_mount_description" TEXT /* Description of the image from the slide mount */,
  "image_note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the image */,
  "slide_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the slide */,
  "city_state" TEXT /* City and state where the image was taken */,
  "geocoordinates" TEXT /* Geocoordinates of the location where the image was taken */,
  "personal_names_1" TEXT /* Personal names associated with the image */,
  "corporate_names_1" TEXT /* Corporate names associated with the image */,
  "other_names_1" TEXT /* Other names associated with the image */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the image */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license under which the image is available */,
  "curator_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from curators for internal use */,
  "digitization_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was digitized */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image in pixels */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Physical or digital storage location of the original image */,
  "restoration_status" TEXT /* Status of any restoration work done on the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_city_state FOREIGN KEY ("city_state") REFERENCES locations ("city_state"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_corporate_names_1 FOREIGN KEY ("corporate_names_1") REFERENCES corporate_names ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_genres" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "genre_1" TEXT /* Primary genre of the image */,
  "genre_2" TEXT /* Secondary genre of the image */,
  "genre_3" TEXT /* Tertiary genre of the image */,
  "genre_4" TEXT /* Quaternary genre of the image */,
  "genre_5" TEXT /* Quinary genre of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topical_subject_headings" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "topical_subject_1" TEXT /* First topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_2" TEXT /* Second topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_3" TEXT /* Third topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_4" TEXT /* Fourth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_5" TEXT /* Fifth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_6" TEXT /* Sixth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_7" TEXT /* Seventh topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_8" TEXT /* Eighth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_9" TEXT /* Ninth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_10" TEXT /* Tenth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_11" TEXT /* Eleventh topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_12" TEXT /* Twelfth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_13" TEXT /* Thirteenth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_14" TEXT /* Fourteenth topical subject heading */,
  "topical_subject_15" TEXT /* Fifteenth topical subject heading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image file */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file in case of updates */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, deprecated, etc.) */,
  "file_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the file in pixels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, public) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, curator, researcher, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the image */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city_state" TEXT /* City and state where the image was taken */,
  "geocoordinates" TEXT /* Geocoordinates of the location where the image was taken */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the image was taken */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the image was taken */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, etc.) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_names" (
  "corporate_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporate name */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the corporate entity */,
  "corporate_type" TEXT /* Type of corporate entity (e.g., company, organization, etc.) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the corporate entity was founded */,
  "dissolution_year" INTEGER /* Year the corporate entity was dissolved (if applicable) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the locations table to link the corporate name to a location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corporate_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporate_names_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
